creator: jaapb@kerguelen.org
text:
On Tuesday 01 March 2011 16:38:04 Johan van Selst wrote:
> Note that the old master site (www.ocaml.info) still works fine as well
> and has a tarball with the same version number, but apparently different
> contents (size) than the one on hg.ocaml.info. I'm curious what changed.

There doesn't seem to be any difference at all, the different size is probably 
due to the changed directory name (pcre-ocaml-6.2.2 vs. pcre-ocaml-
release-6.2.2).

> %%PORTEXAMPLES%% should only be used if the port actually honours the
> NOPORTEXAMPLES setting. At the moment it doesn't, but that should
> probably be addressed as well.

In fact, you can just do a s/NOPORTDOCS/NOPORTEXAMPLES/ in the Makefile, 
whether or not the examples are installed is currently governed by the 
NOPORTDOCS variable...
